mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsPblancApplyAttachDao.select */ select apply_id , atchmnfl_setup_id , attachment_id , samenss_rate , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_attach where apply_id = #{applyId} and atchmnfl_setup_id = #{atchmnflSetupId}

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplyAttachDao.selectList */ select ubas.atchmnfl_setup_id , ubas.bsns_cd , ubas.file_knd_nm , ubas.essntl , ubas.format_attachment_id , ( select file_nm from cmmt_attachment where attachment_id = ubas.format_attachment_id and attachment_group_id = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@SINGLE_FILE_GROUP_ID}' and file_deleted = false ) as format_attachment_nm , ubpaa.attachment_id , ca.file_nm as attachment_nm , ca.file_size as attachment_size from uspt_bsns_atchmnfl_setup ubas left outer join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_attach ubpaa on ubpaa.atchmnfl_setup_id = ubas.atchmnfl_setup_id and ubpaa.apply_id = #{applyId} left outer join cmmt_attachment ca on ca.attachment_id = ubpaa.attachment_id and attachment_group_id = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@SINGLE_FILE_GROUP_ID}' and ca.file_deleted = false where ubas.bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd}
